## Checklist

- [ ] Da doc `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] Da cap nhat `docs/features/<feature>/SPEC.md` neu thay doi feature
- [ ] Da them/cap nhat l10n trong `lib/core/l10n/app_localizations.dart`
- [ ] Khong hard-code user-facing text trong UI
- [ ] UI dung `AppColors`, `AppTheme`, `Theme.of(context)`
- [ ] Khong goi API/SQLite truc tiep trong page/widget
- [ ] Da dang ky dependency trong `main.dart` neu them datasource/repository/bloc
- [ ] Da chay `flutter analyze`
- [ ] Da chay test lien quan neu co
